nodes.name: playwright.config.ts
nodes.summary: Playwright E2E test configuration for the admin panel, defining Chromium browser tests against localhost:5173 with a Vite dev server webServer setup

nodes.name: bundle-diff.mjs
nodes.summary: Bundle size diffing script that compares current dist/assets chunk sizes (raw and gzipped) against a baseline Markdown table, enforcing per-chunk gzip budget and delta tolerance thresholds

nodes.name: check-import-boundaries.mjs
nodes.summary: Import boundary enforcement script that validates module layering rules across apps, pages, features, and packages directories, forbidding cross-layer violations such as packages importing from features or apps

nodes.name: scan-large-files.sh
nodes.summary: Shell script that scans for large TS/TSX (>=800 lines) and Go files (>=1000 lines) across the codeProxy frontend and CliRelay backend directories

nodes.name: panelMetadata.ts
nodes.summary: Vite plugin that emits a panel-meta.json asset during build containing version, commit SHA, git ref, repository URL, and build date, derived from environment variables or git commands

nodes.name: panelMetadata.test.ts
nodes.summary: Unit tests for createPanelMetadata verifying version derivation from commit/ref and preservation of explicit version strings

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Root Vite build configuration for the admin panel with React, Tailwind CSS, path aliases, SCSS preprocessing, manual chunk splitting for vendor libraries, dev server proxy to backend, and Vitest test configuration

nodes.name: createPanelMetadata
nodes.summary: Creates a PanelMetadata object from input, normalizing ref, committing, and deriving a version string from appVersion, ref, and short commit SHA

nodes.name: resolvePanelMetadata
nodes.summary: Resolves panel metadata by reading environment variables with fallback to git commands, then delegates to createPanelMetadata

nodes.name: panelMetadataPlugin
nodes.summary: Returns a Vite Plugin that emits panel-meta.json as a build asset using resolved panel metadata

nodes.name: readBaseline
nodes.summary: Parses the bundle-baseline.md Markdown table to extract baseline chunk size and gzip values

nodes.name: findCurrentChunks
nodes.summary: Scans dist/assets directory and matches files to baseline chunk keys, computing current raw and gzip sizes

nodes.name: resolveAlias
nodes.summary: Resolves path aliases (@code-proxy/, @pages/, @features/, @app/, @/) to their filesystem paths

nodes.name: canImport
nodes.summary: Evaluates whether a source module layer is allowed to import from a target module layer based on dependency rules (apps can import anything, features can only import features/packages, packages can only import packages)

edges.label: analyzes dist output produced by vite build
enforces import boundaries for modules built by vite
uses vite dev server for E2E tests
used as vite plugin in build chain
resolveAlias provides resolved paths to canImport for boundary checks
baseline keys are used by findCurrentChunks for matching
